heading: Emergency response coordination of primary care providers
label: 300hh–17 Emergency response coordination of primary care providers

children.text: provide guidance and technical assistance to health centers funded under and to State and local health departments and emergency managers to integrate health centers into State and local emergency response plans and to better meet the primary care needs of populations served by health centers during public health emergencies; andsection 254b of this title

encourage employees at health centers funded under to participate in emergency medical response programs including the National Disaster Medical System authorized in , the Volunteer Medical Reserve Corps authorized in , and the Emergency System for Advance Registration of Health Professions Volunteers authorized in .section 254b of this titlesection 300hh–11 of this titlesection 300hh–15 of this titlesection 247d–7b of this title
